7.reason: [Array index out of bounds: accessing a[n] which is invalid for an array of size n indexed from 1 to n-1 or 0 to n-1 depending on context, but here logic is flawed. Also, the loop condition j<n+1 accesses a[n], which is out of bounds if a is treated as 1-indexed with size n. More importantly, the repeat function logic is inefficient and incorrect for checking permutations during generation.]
